title: Books and records; audit
doc_html:
§654.  Books and records; audit

All books and records of the civil air patrol shall be subject to audit and review by the legislative auditor to the same extent as all other state departments or agencies.  

Added by Acts 1968, No. 333, §1.
doc_text:
§654.  Books and records; audit
All books and records of the civil air patrol shall be subject to audit and review by the legislative auditor to the same extent as all other state departments or agencies.
Added by Acts 1968, No. 333, §1.
